untranslatable_reason: Signal requires correlation analysis (0.50-0.70 range) and cointegration testing between multiple stocks/industrial groups. These are portfolio-level statistical measures requiring multi-asset comparison, not single-bar indicators. The backtest engine must implement correlation matrix and cointegration tests at the portfolio construction level before applying mean-reversion logic to selected pairs/groups.
translation_notes: This is a pair/group selection strategy, not a single-asset entry/exit signal. Correlation screening (0.50-0.70) and cointegration analysis must occur during portfolio setup phase. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT translated to mean-reversion reversal logic (exit long on negative returns, exit short on positive returns). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT because once pairs are selected, individual legs can be long or short depending on the arbitrage opportunity.
